## Communication Preferences

> Populated over time. What works, what doesn't.

- Only full-time data scientist on Platform — isolation is a real risk
- Prefers working in Jupyter + shared Notion doc over meetings
- Responds best to coaching that connects to research goals, not just delivery
- Quiet in team settings — use 1:1s for real conversation
- Has a standing monthly chat with the broader data science community across the company
